title: Cavaliers defeat Union Stars 2
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Cavaliers made a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Cavaliers made a confident start to the second half of the club cricket season, securing maximum points with a four-wicket victory over Union Stars II as action resumed on Saturday 10 January following the holiday break.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Cavaliers made a confident start to the second half of the club cricket season, securing maximum points with a four-wicket victory over Union Stars II as action resumed on Saturday 10 January following the holiday break."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Playing at Loerie Park, the Cavaliers chased down a modest target in just 31.2 overs to underline their intent, highlighting a weekend of competitive, low-scoring encounters across the region."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Elsewhere, the opening round after the break produced a major upset at the Bridgton Sportsgrounds in Oudtshoorn, where a struggling George side stunned defending champions Union Stars I by nine runs on a dry, spin-friendly surface. Sussex maintained their grip at the top of the log with a bonus-point win over Harlequins Forces.","html":"Elsewhere, the opening round after the break produced a major upset at the Bridgton Sportsgrounds in Oudtshoorn, where a struggling George side stunned defending champions Union Stars I by nine runs on a dry, spin-friendly surface. Sussex maintained their grip at the top of the log with a bonus-point win over Harlequins Forces."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United strengthened their title challenge with a dominant derby victory against New Dawn Park.","html":"Pacaltsdorp United strengthened their title challenge with a dominant derby victory against New Dawn Park."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Spin bowlers were the dominant force throughout the weekend, shaping the outcome of several tightly contested matches as teams adjusted to challenging post-break conditions."},{"type":"list","items":["Knysna Cavaliers beat Union Stars II with 4 wickets:"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars II 126 all out (Ineal Arries 35, Mario Tarentaal 27, Jayver Philander 20, AB van der Walt 4/11, Jonathan Bester 3/21, Joof Enslin 2/20).","html":"Union Stars II 126 all out (Ineal Arries 35, Mario Tarentaal 27, Jayver Philander 20, AB van der Walt 4/11, Jonathan Bester 3/21, Joof Enslin 2/20)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Cavaliers 127/6 (Maurice White 27*, James Bruiners 3/28).","html":"Knysna Cavaliers 127/6 (Maurice White 27*, James Bruiners 3/28)."},{"type":"list","items":["George beat Union Stars I with 9 runs:"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George 76 all out (Corné Kennedy 4/22, Lee-Henry Meyer 2/16, Shirwin Plaatjies 2/11).","html":"George 76 all out (Corné Kennedy 4/22, Lee-Henry Meyer 2/16, Shirwin Plaatjies 2/11)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars I 67 all out (PJ Carstens 4/22, Neil Jordan 3/25, Shelby Lindeque 2/9).","html":"Union Stars I 67 all out (PJ Carstens 4/22, Neil Jordan 3/25, Shelby Lindeque 2/9)."},{"type":"list","items":["Sussex beat Harlequins Forces with 3 wickets:"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Harlequins Forces 129 all out (Camron Avontuur 43, Marco Jansen 29, Ravin-Lee Kemmies 5/32, Franco Geldenhuys 2/30).","html":"Harlequins Forces 129 all out (Camron Avontuur 43, Marco Jansen 29, Ravin-Lee Kemmies 5/32, Franco Geldenhuys 2/30)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex 131/7 (Lindl Trim 44*, Roual de Reuck 22, Gavaldhino Pietersen 5/37).","html":"Sussex 131/7 (Lindl Trim 44*, Roual de Reuck 22, Gavaldhino Pietersen 5/37)."},{"type":"list","items":["Pacaltsdorp United beat New Dawn Park with 130 runs:"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United 206 all out (Pieter Stuurman 56, Anaxolo Khitshini 52,","html":"Pacaltsdorp United 206 all out (Pieter Stuurman 56, Anaxolo Khitshini 52,"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Eliah Thorne 22, Dimitri Carelse 4/12, Danvor Muller 2/21, Ivandro Samson 2/27).","html":"Eliah Thorne 22, Dimitri Carelse 4/12, Danvor Muller 2/21, Ivandro Samson 2/27)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"New Dawn Park 76 all out (Leegan Moos 29, Ryan Mertin 3/13, Elih Thorne 2/17, Ricordo Majolla 2/11).","html":"New Dawn Park 76 all out (Leegan Moos 29, Ryan
